metadata.description: Wren Engine — discovery stub for AI agents. Actual workflow guides, reference docs and prompt helpers ship inside the wren CLI (pip install wrenai) and are served by `wren skills get` / `wren docs get` / `wren ask`.

plugins.name: wren
plugins.description: Wren CLI for AI agents — semantic SQL over 22+ databases. Installs a single discovery stub that points the agent at the wren CLI for all workflow content.
